GitNexus monorepo (CLI + web UI)

Core docs
- README.md
- AGENTS.md
- ARCHITECTURE.md
- CONTRIBUTING.md
- GUARDRAILS.md
- TESTING.md
- RUNBOOK.md

Key directories
- gitnexus/ (CLI/core, MCP server)
- gitnexus-web/ (web UI)
- gitnexus-claude-plugin/ (Claude marketplace config)
- gitnexus-cursor-integration/ (Cursor integration config)
